name: founder-skills
description: A judgment layer for Claude Code — session calibration, token budget routing, and a validate→spec→plan chain. Works for any builder, developer, or researcher using Claude Code with Fable 5.

plugins.name: session-start
plugins.description: Judgment layer entry point — three AskUserQuestion prompts establish effort tier, domain, and skill routing before any work begins. Start every session here.

plugins.name: effort
plugins.description: Single-question token budget calibrator — sets the model routing tier (Opus 4.8 / Sonnet 4.6, with an external-executor fallback) for the session. Downstream skills inherit this choice.

plugins.name: market-validation
plugins.description: Validate whether there is a real market for a product idea: multi-angle web research with live-URL verification → cited evidence pack → Tufte HTML deck + PDF/PPTX → a build/integrate brief and an emitted market-map graph.

plugins.name: build-options
plugins.description: Decide what to build after a market is validated: divergent options → independent judge-panel weighted decision matrix → adversarial stress-test → a recommended build with kill criteria. Chains into prd → tasks.

plugins.name: prd
plugins.description: Generate a Product Requirements Document for a new feature: self-clarify the open questions, then produce a clear, actionable, implementation-ready PRD. Chains after build-options and into tasks.

plugins.name: tasks
plugins.description: Convert a PRD markdown file into a prd.json task plan: extract tasks and explode each into granular, machine-verifiable sub-tasks with acceptance criteria. Chains after prd.
